title: Shantinatha temple, Ramtek
tagline: Shantinatha temple, Ramtek — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Shantinatha temple, Ramtek is a major Jain tirth (pilgrimage site) in the Indian state of Maharashtra, located between the villages of Ramtek in Nagpur district.
overview.description: Shantinatha temple, Ramtek is a major Jain tirth (pilgrimage site) in the Indian state of Maharashtra, located between the villages of Ramtek in Nagpur district.

topPlaces.name: Khindsi Lake
topPlaces.description: Khindsi Lake is a lake near the city of Ramtek in the Nagpur district of India. The lake offers boating activities, watersports, restaurants, and resorts, which are operated by Rajkamal Tourism and Olive Resorts at Khindsi Lake.

topPlaces.name: Ramtek Dam
topPlaces.description: Ramtek Dam, is an earthfill dam on Sur River near Ramtek, Nagpur district in the state of Maharashtra in India.

topPlaces.name: Mansar, India
topPlaces.description: Mansar is a census town in Ramtek tehsil of Nagpur district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. This town is located 5 km west of Ramtek and 45 km northeast of Nagpur city.

topPlaces.name: Kachurwahi
topPlaces.description: Kachurwahi is a Gram Panchayat village in Ramtek Tehsil of Nagpur district, India. It is situated in the South East of Ramtek at the distance of 10 km from Ramtek.

topPlaces.name: Mahadula
topPlaces.description: Mahadula is a census town in Nagpur district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shantinatha temple, Ramtek?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shantinatha temple, Ramtek is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shantinatha temple, Ramtek?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar International Airport, Nagpur (46 km) and the nearest railway station is Nagpur Junction (37 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shantinatha temple, Ramtek?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shantinatha temple, Ramtek at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shantinatha temple, Ramtek?
faq.a: Stays in Shantinatha temple, Ramtek start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shantinatha temple, Ramtek?
faq.a: The top attractions are Khindsi Lake, Ramtek Dam, Mansar, India, Kachurwahi, Mahadula.
